posts.author: scanx.trade
posts.text: Ksolves promoters declare no encumbrance on shares in FY26

posts.author: singhi08
posts.community: Ksolves - a newage software development firm
posts.text: Also tracking and investing in the company. Results seem to be decent; it might not grow at the pace it used to, but growth and if they play it right a long runway for growth is there is there. I feel it has already formed the bottom but the whole tech sector is not looking good right now. Once the narrative changes around AI, this should do well.
